brief_notes: Extremely dense and faithful to extraction. Every statistic, including all F values, p values and interaction terms, matches verbatim (open field 29.56, zero maze 40.22, Y-maze 7.517/0.0091, extinction 5.494, generalization 26.53, glia 13.42, 26.95, 41.82, etc.). Three well-organized tables (anxiety, fear, glia). Includes Apoe 50% AD quote. Methods remarkably detailed. Discussion covers limitations explicitly including Month 0 baseline concern.
